description: Linktree is a link-in-bio platform that lets creators, brands, and businesses publish a single landing page containing links, media, products, and integrations. It also operates a marketplace for apps and partner integrations that extend Linktree profiles.
summary: Linktree publicly exposes a public MCP server at `https://chat-mcp-openai-app.production.linktr.ee/mcp` and indicates a broader OAuth-protected developer/API surface tied to its developer program, but no public REST/GraphQL spec or CLI docs were found.
